title: Cauthon Marriage
body:
## Features
Propose Marriage: Players can propose marriage to other players.
Accept Proposal: Players can accept marriage proposals.
Refuse Proposal: Players can refuse marriage proposals.
Marriage Information: Players can get information about their current marriage status.
Online/Offline Notifications: Players receive notifications when their partner comes online or goes offline.

## Commands
1. /cauthonmarriage propose [PlayerName]: Propose marriage to another player.
2. /cauthonmarriage accept: Accept a marriage proposal.
3. /cauthonmarriage refuse: Refuse a marriage proposal.
4. /cauthonmarriage info: Get information about your current marriage status.

5. /cauthonmarriage divorce: Lets admins divorce players

We have a discord now!!! [https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD](https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD)
